name: agent-project-bootstrap
description: Scaffold a runtime-agnostic multi-agent project: one persona.yaml hydrates working personas on any AI coding agent (Claude Code, code-puppy, ...) via per-runtime adapters. One front door (START.md → ORCHESTRATE/PARTICIPATE); the legacy v0.3 emit modes are deprecated and quarantined in legacy/. Also ships a sister skill — multi-agent-audit — for grading multi-agent projects against an evidence-based rubric (read-only). v1.4 folds in the July-2026 ways-of-working (ADR-002): single-account first principle, everything-material-gets-a-handoff, lock-via-open-PR + CI guard, reviewer + merger personas, persona.yaml parity for librarian and autonomous archetypes, and real CI (adapter-table acceptance test + repo lint).
